definitions.text:

definitions.text: (1) term, period, session; issue, number (of a periodical); (2) strange, odd, eccentric; (3) until; (4) chess; (5) flag; (6) to request, hope for; (7) to rub

[kỳ] flag; banner chess period; term; date; instalment 
 Trả đúng kỳ 
 To pay at fixed dates 
 Trả thành nhiều kỳ 
 To pay by instalments

 This reportage will be serialized in four parts in the local weekly

 A pregnancy approaching its term
